description: The following function has an off-by-one bug. Fix it so that page is treated as 1-indexed: page 1 returns items[0:page_size], page 2 returns items[page_size:2*page_size], etc. Return an empty list if the page is out of range. Name the fixed function paginate.
solution_template:
def paginate(items: list, page: int, page_size: int) -> list:
    """Return the items for the given 1-indexed page."""
    start = page * page_size
    end = start + page_size
    return items[start:end]
